decision_target: Decide the valid throughput, allocation, and retained-memory design for Lite owned and managed execution and one SDK session turn, then rank source-backed optimization candidates.
source_of_truth: benchmarks/lite-perf built-dist harness and row manifest
read_method: Inspect the exact row manifest, deterministic harness checks, built-artifact provenance, lifecycle and session source paths, and existing semantic tests. Run the deterministic harness checker once. Do not collect candidate performance samples.

measurement_validity.existing_47_row_throughput_design: valid for its declared 39 Lite and 8 Lite React micro-rows; no fresh comparison was collected
measurement_validity.targeted_lifecycle_throughput: invalid until the missing owned, resource, and session rows are fixed in the manifest
measurement_validity.allocation: invalid because no allocation observation schema, sampler, controls, rows, or comparator exists
measurement_validity.retained_memory: invalid because no post-close retained-memory probe, calibration, denominator rule, or comparator exists
measurement_validity.baseline_provenance: invalid for CKR use because ignored dist files are not proven clean builds of the exact head

questions_answered: The existing harness is built-dist-only and fingerprints artifacts, environment, lockfile, row manifest, and observation writer.
Its deterministic checker passes 14 of 14 and rejects missing rows, source imports, mixed environments, artifact drift, wrong order, unsupported pair counts, and false-green mixed evidence.
The manifest contains exactly 39 Lite and 8 Lite React throughput rows.
No existing row exercises scope.run owned execution, resource ownership lifecycle, SDK session.run, allocation, or post-close retained memory.
The current dist files cannot become the immutable baseline without a clean exact-head rebuild and recorded build provenance.
questions_unanswered: Whether the representative SDK row is minimum session.run or complete agent.turn. Recommendation is minimum session.run as representative and agent.turn as supplementary.
No production frequency data supports workload weighting. Recommendation is equal-weight geometric aggregation until workload evidence exists.
A retained-memory baseline may be indistinguishable from calibrated noise. The denominator rule must fail closed.
No independent validator record exists yet.

missing_rows.workload: One scope.run with a scalar no-dependency flow, including temporary context creation, execution, and close
One owned run resolving one boundary-owned resource with one cleanup and awaiting full cleanup
Fresh managed context and first flow execution resolving one boundary-owned resource
Second execution on the same context with the same boundary-owned resource, followed by close
One execution resolving one current-owned resource with cleanup completed before return
Outer and one nested flow share exactly one current-owned resource while a sibling gets a fresh value
Fresh bound session context and empty record; one session.run selecting a scalar no-op turn; consume, settle, close, and await deactivation
Supplementary one-round agent.turn with a stub model returning stop true and no tools, skills, or subagents

allocation_calibration.process: Separate fixed Node process; warmup outside measurement; freeze batch size before variants
allocation_calibration.method: V8 inspector allocation sampling with fixed interval; report gross sampled bytes per operation
controls: one retained 1 KiB allocation per operation
two retained 1 KiB allocations per operation
allocation_calibration.admissibility: workload signal at least 10x empty-loop signal and two-object to one-object ratio in [1.8, 2.2]
allocation_calibration.pairing: same adjacent alternating five-pair order as throughput with only the predeclared four-pair fallback
allocation_calibration.ratio: candidate sampled bytes per operation divided by baseline sampled bytes per operation

retained_memory_design.sequence: fixed warmup, three fixed GC and microtask cycles, pre-snapshot, all operations and cleanup, clear references, three fixed GC and microtask cycles, post-snapshot
controls: deliberately retained 1 KiB per operation positive control
retained_memory_design.estimate: retained bytes per operation from the N and 2N slope
retained_memory_design.denominator_rule: fail closed when baseline slope is at or below calibrated noise
retained_memory_design.ratio: (candidate slope + noise bound) / (baseline slope - noise bound)
retained_memory_design.target: every first-stage pair <= 1.05 or at least 8 of 9 only after predeclared fallback

ranked_candidates.finding: Empty tag seeding allocates a Set and spread arrays when all tag lists are absent
Every execution context eagerly allocates three maps, three sets, and an AbortController
Child execution creates its own abort controller and a second combined controller and listener graph
Every first resource resolution builds a context object with ten bound methods
One session turn repeatedly copies record arrays and scans new work and branches
Each Runtime constructs and freezes registry objects with many capturing closures

immutable_baseline.measurement_commit: Create a benchmark-only descendant with workload, allocation, retained-memory, schema, comparator, and checker changes

decision: Save the design learning, block optimization and performance claims, add and validate the measurement-only surface first, then establish an immutable baseline.
